description: Synthesis rules for combining multiple chart factors into coherent interpretations for major life questions. This is the logic the Interpretation Engine uses to merge planetary data into human themes.

primary_factors.factor: Jupiter position (for women - karaka of husband)

harmonious_marriage_indicators: 7th lord well-placed in trikona (1,5,9) or kendra (1,4,7,10) houses
challenging_marriage_indicators: Malefic occupation of 7th house (Mars, Saturn, Rahu, Ketu)
delayed_marriage_indicators: Saturn aspecting 7th house or its lord
synthesis_rules.timing_marriage: Look for: Venus/Jupiter dasha or bhukti, 7th lord period, Rahu in 7th period (for unconventional marriage), transit of Jupiter over 7th house or natal Venus/Moon

human_interpretation_layer.good_combination: Your chart shows the potential for a deeply harmonious partnership. There's a natural ability to maintain love and connection. The right person is being drawn toward you through karmic threads.
human_interpretation_layer.challenging_combination: Marriage and partnerships are a significant area of soul learning for you. This doesn't mean unhappy relationships - it means each relationship will teach you something profound about love, boundaries, and self-worth.
human_interpretation_layer.delayed_timing: Marriage may come later than expected, which is actually a blessing - your soul needs time to develop emotional maturity first. When it comes, it will be more stable and meaningful.

career_field_indicators.moon_strong_10th: Public service, food/hospitality, hospitality, water-related, mother-related work
career_field_indicators.mars_strong_10th: Military, engineering, sports, surgery, real estate, business
career_field_indicators.mercury_strong_10th: Communication, writing, media, business, IT, teaching
career_field_indicators.jupiter_strong_10th: Teaching, law, finance, religious work, counseling
career_field_indicators.venus_strong_10th: Arts, entertainment, fashion, luxury goods, beauty, relationships work
career_field_indicators.saturn_strong_10th: Long-term business, government service, manual labor, oil/mining, leadership in old age
career_field_indicators.rahu_strong_10th: Foreign work, technology, unconventional fields, sudden rise
career_field_indicators.ketu_strong_10th: Spiritual work, research, healing, mysterious fields, IT (in modern times)

career_success_indicators: 10th lord exalted or in own sign
Dharma-Karma adhipati yoga (9th and 10th lord conjunction)

human_interpretation_layer.strong_career: There's significant career potential in your chart. Your work life is meant to express your authentic gifts and bring substantial recognition.
human_interpretation_layer.service_oriented_career: Your soul finds meaning through serving others. Traditional success may matter less to you than meaningful work.
human_interpretation_layer.delayed_success: Career success comes later in life but it builds something lasting. Don't worry about early comparisons - your foundation is being laid.
human_interpretation_layer.multiple_careers: Your path is multifaceted. You're meant to evolve through different work, each phase teaching something new.

health_synthesis.important_disclaimer: Astrology shows tendencies and karmic patterns, never replaces medical consultation. Always recommend qualified medical professionals for actual concerns.

planet_body_mapping.moon: Mind, emotions, fluids, breast, stomach, lungs (left)
planet_body_mapping.mars: Blood, muscles, bone marrow, head, hot conditions, accidents
planet_body_mapping.mercury: Nervous system, skin, voice, hands, intestines
planet_body_mapping.venus: Reproductive system, kidneys, eyes (left), face, beauty
planet_body_mapping.saturn: Bones, joints, teeth, nerves, knees, chronic conditions
planet_body_mapping.rahu: Mental confusion, addictions, mysterious illness, allergies
planet_body_mapping.ketu: Skin, parasites, mysterious losses, spiritual diseases

human_interpretation_layer.general_health_strong: Your chart shows good underlying vitality. Maintain it with regular exercise, ayurvedic principles suited to your dosha.
human_interpretation_layer.health_attention_needed: There are some areas your chart suggests paying mindful attention to. This is preventive wisdom, not prediction. Regular checkups are advised.
human_interpretation_layer.mental_health_emphasis: Your emotional and mental wellbeing is especially important for you. Meditation, therapy, and emotional expression practices serve you well.

wealth_indicators: Lord of 2nd in 11th or vice versa (classical Dhana Yoga)
Exalted/own sign planets in wealth houses
wealth_challenges_indicators: Rahu/Ketu afflicting wealth houses without bhanga
12th house strong without 2nd/11th balance (expenses exceed income)

human_interpretation_layer.wealthy_chart: There's strong wealth potential in your chart. Use it not just for luxury but to bring meaning - charitable wealth multiplies.
human_interpretation_layer.moderate_wealth: Your chart shows steady, earned prosperity. Wealth comes through right effort and integrity over time.
human_interpretation_layer.wealth_struggles: Material abundance may require more effort. Focus on building skills, ethical work, and detachment from outcomes - paradoxically this brings prosperity.
human_interpretation_layer.wealth_through_unusual_means: Your wealth comes through unconventional paths - foreign sources, technology, or unique skills.

spiritual_path_indicators.jupiter_strong: Path of knowledge and wisdom (Jnana Yoga)
spiritual_path_indicators.venus_strong: Path of devotion and love (Bhakti Yoga)
spiritual_path_indicators.mars_strong: Path of action and service (Karma Yoga)
spiritual_path_indicators.saturn_strong: Path of discipline and austerity (Raja Yoga / Tapas)
spiritual_path_indicators.ketu_strong: Direct path of liberation, often unconventional, mystical
spiritual_path_indicators.rahu_with_jupiter: Path of unconventional spirituality, sometimes confusion before clarity

human_interpretation_layer.strong_spiritual_chart: Your soul has come into this life with deep spiritual purpose. Spiritual practice isn't optional for you - it's your nourishment.
human_interpretation_layer.balanced_dharma_artha: You're meant to live in the world while remaining spiritually connected. The householder path of dharma.
human_interpretation_layer.renunciation_tendency: Your soul carries strong renunciate energies. Even in worldly life, simplicity and spiritual practice will be central.

relationship_synthesis.beyond_marriage: Relationship patterns are not just about marriage but about how the person bonds with everyone.
factors: 5th house (romance), 7th house (partnership), 8th house (intimacy and shared resources)
Venus (love capacity), Moon (emotional needs), Mars (passion and conflict)
Aspects between these planets and houses

patterns.rahu_in_5_or_7: Karmic relationships, attraction to unconventional partners
patterns.ketu_in_5_or_7: Past-life bonds being resolved, sense of completion or detachment in love
patterns.saturn_in_7: Lessons in patience, possibly older or serious partner, delayed but stable relationships
patterns.mars_in_7: Passionate but volatile partnerships, need to control anger in relationships
patterns.venus_jupiter_aspect: Idealistic in love, beautiful relationships, but possibly disappointed by reality
patterns.moon_saturn_aspect: Emotional reserve, may attract partners who reflect emotional themes from childhood

synthesis_algorithm_pseudocode.description: How the interpretation engine should combine factors
steps: 1. For each life area (marriage, career, health, etc.), identify the 5-7 primary factors from the chart
2. Calculate dignity and strength of each factor
6. Layer in major transits (especially Saturn, Jupiter, Rahu-Ketu)
7. Translate technical findings into human emotional themes
9. Suggest remedies if challenges are significant
synthesis_algorithm_pseudocode.weighting_principle: Natal chart promises > Dasha highlights it > Transit triggers it. A transit cannot create what is not in the chart.
